title: lilium davidii var. davidii
intro: Lilium davidii var. davidii, also known as the David's lily, is a species of lily native to western China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the bulbs and flowers of Lilium davidii var. davidii can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
